text:
There once was a mouse named Mittens. Mittens lived in a cozy little house filled with many treasures. One sunny morning, Mittens noticed a small, golden mouse hat sitting beside her bed.

"You wouldn't happen to be wearing that?" Mittens asked curiously.

Oh no! Her fluffy little tail twitched. "Oh dear! I lost it in a garden treasure hunt!"

Mittens smiled. "Well then!"

That afternoon, Mittens set out on an expedition to find her hat. She chased butterflies and poked at bee nests. Finally, after an adventure, she found the hat perched atop a wild rose bush.

"Mighty fine hat you have there," she said kindly. "Care to come home with Mittens?"

The hat nodded enthusiastically.

"Mighty grateful you're back. Think I'll wear it today."

And so Mittens proudly wore her golden mouse hat outdoors. Everyone paused on the street to admire her plucky feathered friend.
